en.name: Ventilation mode - Pressure driven (PCV)
en.shortDescription: Pressure-controlled and volume-targeted-pressure-control (dual) ventilation modes — the ventilator regulates airway pressure.
en.longDescription:
## Definition & Clinical Context

Pressure-controlled mechanical ventilation modes, where the ventilator targets a set airway pressure and the delivered tidal volume varies with the patient's lung mechanics. Also includes dual / volume-targeted pressure-control modes (e.g. PRVC), where pressure is the controlled variable but a tidal volume is set as the target. In source data this is a **procedure** record indicating the ventilation mode in use; there is no unit. It is recorded in intensive care and anaesthesia for ventilated patients. The mode is independent of whether ventilation is invasive (via an endotracheal/tracheostomy tube) or non-invasive (via a mask) — that distinction is captured in the Invasive mechanical ventilation and Non-invasive ventilation concept sets.

## Included Concepts

The set lists the SNOMED procedure concepts for these modes.

- *37152364 / 1186622005 — Synchronized intermittent mandatory ventilation - pressure-control pressure-support inflation (SNOMED)*
- *37152384 / 1186679003 — Synchronized intermittent mandatory ventilation - volume targeted pressure-control and pressure-support inflation (SNOMED)*
- *37152386 / 1186681001 — Synchronized intermittent mandatory ventilation with pressure-control, two levels of pressure-support and an assured constant airway pressure adjunct (SNOMED)*
- *37152387 / 1186682008 — Synchronized intermittent mandatory ventilation with pressure-control, one level of pressure-support active during both phases and an assured constant airway pressure adjunct (SNOMED)*
- *37152388 / 1186683003 — Synchronized intermittent mandatory ventilation with pressure-control, an assured constant airway pressure adjunct and pressure-support at the higher pressure level only (SNOMED)*
- *37152389 / 1186684009 — Synchronized intermittent mandatory ventilation with synchronized termination pressure-control, pressure-support and an assured constant airway pressure adjunct (SNOMED)*
- *37152390 / 1186685005 — Synchronized intermittent mandatory ventilation with volume targeted pressure-control, pressure-support and an assured constant airway pressure adjunct (SNOMED)*
- *37152408 / 1186744008 — Assist control ventilation volume-targeted pressure-control inflation-type and assured constant airway pressure adjunct (SNOMED)*
- *37152410 / 1186746005 — Assist control ventilation pressure control inflation-type (SNOMED)*
- *37152411 / 1186747001 — Assist control ventilation volume-targeted pressure-control inflation-type (SNOMED)*
- *37152412 / 1186748006 — Assist control ventilation pressure-control inflation-type and assured constant airway pressure adjunct (SNOMED)*

## Mapping Notes

- Map a recorded ventilation mode to the matching concept here based on the control variable / mode family, regardless of whether the patient is invasively or non-invasively ventilated.
- **Mode vs ventilation act**: this set captures the *mode* only; whether the patient is on invasive or non-invasive ventilation is recorded separately (Invasive mechanical ventilation / Non-invasive ventilation concept sets).

fr.name: Mode de ventilation - Piloté en pression (PCV)
fr.shortDescription: Modes de ventilation à pression contrôlée et à pression contrôlée régulée en volume (dual) — le ventilateur régule la pression des voies aériennes.

versions.author: Boris Delange
versions.message: Reorganize Ventilation mode subcategory: PCV now holds pressure-control + volume-targeted-pressure-control (PRVC) modes; BiPAP titration moved to Spontaneous/support, APRV to Other/advanced. Added clinical description.
